name: duocode
description: Collaborative AI workspace — pair-program with Claude, live GitHub integration

scripts.dev: concurrently -n CLIENT,SERVER -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=client" "npm run dev --workspace=server"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=client && npm run typecheck --workspace=server
